mads.note:
Anglican Christian Missionary and Art Historian. Shiraishi was born in January of 1865, in Gunma Prefecture (Twelfth month of the ganji/genji era 元治元年一二月群馬生), see p. 38 in the 1933-edition of the Nihon bijutsu nenkan 日本美術年鑑. Regarding the Date of Death (1929-11-28), see p. 4, morning edition of the Tōkyō Asahi Shinbun 東京朝日新聞.
The articles about and by him are located on the following server-path: \Texte\allgemein Articles\T\Tokyo Bijutsu Gakko
